intro.slogan:
Beyond simple body records,
a way to complete your own aura in a single pictorial.
intro.desc: Fitorialist's suggestion to capture the subject's unique mood and energy rather than just muscle definition

studios.hero_title: Gangnam Sinsa-dong Female Body Profile Studio, FitGirls
studios.zone_title: 80+ Backdrops & Unlimited Background Access for 2+ Concepts
studios.zone_desc: Break away from repetitive, factory-style shoots. FitGirls provides over 80 diverse, high-fidelity background settings (Zones) to capture your unique vibe.
studios.zone_card_title: The Freedom of 80+ Backdrops Unlocked from 2 Concepts
studios.zone_card_desc: Unlike other studios that lock you into one background per concept, FitGirls allows you to switch and combine any of our 80+ settings freely when shooting 2 or more concepts. Craft a premium fashion editorial, natural portrait, and athletic profile all in one reservation.
studios.zone_feat1_desc: Natural-light bedrooms, modern solid colors, chic industrial walls, and more
studios.zone_feat2_desc: Mix and match any zone you want with zero extra fees or strict blockings
studios.zone_feat3_desc: Sculpting studio lights customized for every backdrop to highlight your best physique
studios.zone_btn_label: Explore All 80+ FitGirls Background Zones in Real-Time
studios.lookbook_title: FitGirls Free Outfit Rental & Lookbook Service
studios.lookbook_desc: We provide dozens of carefully curated outfits and props that highlight your body lines, 100% free of charge without any extra cost.
studios.lookbook_card_desc: Based on vast photoshoot data, we have prepared imported monokinis, chic bodysuits, denim jackets, crop sporty outfits, and more that are hard to find in regular lingerie stores. No worries about sizing or body type, just bring yourself and enjoy a magical fit.
studios.lookbook_feat1_desc: Patterns that maximize body shaping and volume
studios.lookbook_feat2_desc: Hip street fashion without exposure pressure
studios.lookbook_feat3_desc: 12cm+ heels and various styling props to enhance proportions
studios.lookbook_feat4_desc: High-temperature steam care for hygiene peace of mind
studios.lookbook_btn_label: View All FitGirls Free Rental Outfits (Lookbook)
studios.hero_desc: FitGirls is not just about typical fitness verification photos, but a premium studio capturing individual mood and narrative in female body profile and editorial photoshoots. From concept planning to wardrobe, posing, mood, and styling, we direct every detail tailored for you.
studios.why_subtitle: There is a clear value and difference why countless women prefer and highly praise FitGirls Studio in Sinsa, Gangnam.
studios.why_1_title: ① Expert Posing Direction for Women
studios.why_1_desc: We direct styling and postures tailored to your body type and mood so even beginners won't feel awkward. Rather than repeating uniform poses, we discover the most natural and beautiful angles together.
studios.why_2_desc: Unsure of what to wear or how to pose? We analyze your inspiration, body type, and wardrobe to map out the optimal lighting and style guide before the actual photoshoot.
studios.why_3_desc: Beyond 'making the muscles look as large as possible,' we focus on expressions, emotions, fashion, and aesthetic space variables to create magazine-worthy masterpieces.
studios.why_4_desc: We support first-time body profiles, fitness logs, diet achievements, birthdays, bucket lists, pre-wedding memories, and twin/friendship shoots.
studios.purpose_title: 🎯 Most Popular Shoot Purpose Categories at FitGirls
studios.process_desc: From initial booking to receiving retouched photos, our process at Sinsa Studio is structured to eliminate any anxiety for beginners.

process_steps.title: STEP 1. Consultation & Booking
process_steps.desc: Consult shoot goals, desired concepts, schedule, and package options.

process_steps.title: STEP 2. Concept Development
process_steps.desc: Determine backdrops, styling, hair & makeup, and posture direction based on references.

process_steps.title: STEP 3. Preparation Guide
process_steps.desc: Provide early checklists for diets, tanning, hair removal, nails, and day-of supplies.

process_steps.title: STEP 4. Professional Hair & Makeup
process_steps.desc: Complete tailor-made hair and makeup at our in-house studio or partner shops.

process_steps.title: STEP 5. Shoot & Posing Direction
process_steps.desc: Enjoy 1:1 real-time guidance on gaze, hands, breathing, and facial expressions.

process_steps.title: STEP 6. Photo Selection & Retouching
process_steps.desc: Select best cuts from high-res raw files and receive premium texture retouching.

studios.concept_desc: Explore concepts that perfectly match your body type and mood. Detailed visual guidelines and advice are provided.

concepts.title: Pinterest-Aesthetic Body Profile
concepts.desc: A soft pictorial-style photo merging natural light, retro props, and trendy fashion over rigid gym-style muscle definitions.
concepts.target: Those who want a natural fashion editorial feel and love trendy Instagram aesthetics.
concepts.outfit: Oversized denim jacket, crop tops, denim jeans, off-shoulder sweaters.
concepts.makeup: Natural glass-skin makeup with textured wet hair styling.
concepts.pose: Sitting casually on the floor resting the chin, or interacting naturally with daily props (newspapers, coffee cups).

concepts.title: Natural Bedroom Mood
concepts.desc: A warm and comfortable setting like a sunny morning bedroom, capturing the raw, untouched beauty of the individual.
concepts.target: Those seeking a cozy, low-stress mood with minimal body exposure for their first shoot.
concepts.outfit: Oversized white shirt, pastel-tone innerwear, knitted cardigans.
concepts.makeup: Clear, transparent skin tone correction with loose, messy wave hair.
concepts.pose: Lying down on the bed or wrapping around a clean white duvet with a natural smile.

concepts.title: Chic Black & Silhouette
concepts.desc: A premium concept highlighting sharp contrasts and refined silhouettes, evoking a strong and charismatic atmosphere.
concepts.target: Those wanting to clearly emphasize defined muscle lines (abs, back) with high contrast.
concepts.outfit: Black bodysuit, leather jacket, black bra tops with tailored trousers.
concepts.makeup: Semi-smoky eyes, sleek straight bob or a clean high ponytail.
concepts.pose: Standing and casting a gaze downwards, or capturing deep shadows cast under dramatic spotlights.

concepts.title: Minimalist White Line
concepts.desc: A classic look focusing purely on physical lines and silhouettes against a clean, plain white background using shadow variations.
concepts.target: Those looking to archive a timeless, classic first-time body profile that never goes out of style.
concepts.outfit: Simple white bikini, white crop top and hot shorts, monokinis.
concepts.makeup: Nude-tone contour makeup accentuating natural facial structures.
concepts.pose: Stretching postures that extend limbs cleanly or elevate pelvic curves gracefully.

concepts.title: High-Fashion Editorial
concepts.desc: A trendy concept resembling magazine covers or fashion lookbooks, harmonizing artistic props, backgrounds, and styling.
concepts.target: Those who want to break away from typical underwear photos and become the muse of a fashion brand.
concepts.outfit: Corset belts, bold gold chains, glam look outfits, motorcycle/leather sofa props.
concepts.makeup: Fashion-runway bold lip coloring and deep eye contouring.
concepts.pose: Staring directly into the camera lens or striking high-heeled runway walk postures.

concepts.title: Energetic Sporty Look
concepts.desc: Capturing a healthy, active lifestyle with vibrant colors and energetic athletic vibes.
concepts.target: Women who love active sports like running, yoga, pilates, and gym workouts.
concepts.outfit: Branded sports bra, colorful biker shorts, leggings, sneakers, ball caps.
concepts.makeup: Dewy, moisturized skin with fresh peach/orange tones.
concepts.pose: Dynamic movements like jogging on a treadmill, or posing with a tennis racket/skateboard.

concepts.title: Sensual Feminine Glam
concepts.desc: Maximizing feminine elegance and alluring moods by emphasizing waist-to-hip and collarbone lines.
concepts.target: Those desiring a sensual, rich mood with dressed-up wardrobe and silk textures.
concepts.outfit: Silk slip dress, pearl-embellished bodysuit, premium luxury lingerie.
concepts.makeup: Deep, smokey eye makeup with voluminous airy wave hair.
concepts.pose: Leaning elegantly against a sofa or stool, crossing lines to highlight curves.

concepts.title: Vivid FitGirls Body Profile
concepts.desc: A signature concept featuring FitGirls' unique vivid color refrigerator, retro kitchen with actual cooking props, and bright yellow cabinet settings to capture a popping and cheerful lifestyle vibe.
concepts.target: Those looking to capture a bright, refreshing mood in colorful and uniquely themed studio sets.
concepts.outfit: Retro wear, casual bra tops, overalls, colorful activewear, props like donuts, beverage cups, or rollerblades.
concepts.makeup: Kitsch and fresh fruit-toned makeup, popping high ponytail or twin-tails styling.
concepts.pose: Leaning on the yellow cabinet blowing bubblegum, or opening the retro fridge door to grab a drink with a playful smile.

concepts.title: Artistic Black & White
concepts.desc: An artistic shot stripping away color to focus purely on lighting contrasts, skin textures, and subtle facial emotions.
concepts.target: Those desiring a calm, timeless artistic portrait like a black-and-white print.
concepts.outfit: Minimal black monokini, leather jackets, loose white button-downs.
concepts.makeup: Structured contouring makeup highlighting facial bone definitions.
concepts.pose: Averting direct eye contact to evoke a calm, nostalgic, or emotional mood.

concepts.title: Couples & Friendship
concepts.desc: Capturing the strong chemistry, friendship, and intimate emotions with your partner or best friend.
concepts.target: Couples or friends looking to fulfill a bucket list together and create memorable twin photos.
concepts.outfit: Matching denim-and-white look, identical tone activewear.
concepts.makeup: Balanced styling that harmonizes skin tones and moods of both individuals.
concepts.pose: Holding hands, leaning backs against each other, or exchanging warm, friendly smiles.

studios.review_desc: Real textual feedback from clients who have experienced FitGirls Sinsa Studio, optimizing SEO searchability.

reviews.title: First-time body profile review by a 30s office worker
reviews.meta: 30s Office Worker | First Attempt | Natural & Denim Concept
reviews.content: I was extremely anxious about diet and posing as it was my first time. But the director guided me on every little detail, from finger shapes to breathing patterns. I felt like a professional model. The natural natural light bed cuts turned out amazing!

reviews.title: Review from client who wanted a moody fashion pictorial rather than muscle emphasis
reviews.content: I didn't like the typical bodybuilding style photos with popping veins, so I chose FitGirls. Using everyday props like newspapers and retro cups against denim, I got the exact Pinterest-style fashion shots I wanted. All my friends are asking where I took these!

reviews.title: First body profile review with little fitness experience
reviews.meta: 20s Student | Bucket List | Minimalist White Concept
reviews.content: I was stressed because my abs weren't fully defined, but the lighting adjustments they did in the studio were magical. The natural shadows highlighted definition that wasn't even visible in normal mirrors. Beginners should definitely try this place without fear!

studios.faq_desc: We answer the most common concerns and anxieties women experience before booking their shoots.

faqs.q: Do I need to build a perfect body before booking?
faqs.a: Not at all. Body profiles are not reserved for fitness professionals. FitGirls focuses on discovering the unique body lines and proportions of each individual rather than uniform muscles. Through our custom lighting designs and expert direction, anyone can capture their best self.

faqs.q: Is it okay if I don't have defined abs?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Even without visible abs, we can express a toned, healthy physique using light-and-shadow adjustments and poses that flatter your collarbones and hips. We prioritize overall slimness and mood over dry muscle definitions.

faqs.q: I am a total beginner and feel awkward. Can I still shoot?
faqs.a: Over 90% of our clients are everyday people standing before a studio camera for the first time. Our director will demonstrate and guide you 1:1 on breathing, hand placements, and facial gazes in real-time, so you can just follow along comfortably.

faqs.q: Can I shoot in outfits with minimal exposure?
faqs.a: Yes, many of FitGirls' signature concepts include denim fashion, off-shoulder knits, and chic bodysuits. If underwear feels too exposing, you can pair jeans with a white crop top or wear a tailored jacket for a sophisticated fashion look.

faqs.q: When should I start preparing and booking?
faqs.a: We recommend booking at least 2-3 months prior to your target date. Typically, clients prepare diet and workouts for 60 to 100 days. However, for those needing urgent shoots, we offer short-term posing and lighting solutions to maximize results quickly.

Our philosophy is 'maximizing your strengths while keeping it natural.' Instead of excessive plastic-surgery-style distortion, we focus on detailed skin corrections, line refinements, and body proportions to deliver high-end, elegant magazine quality.

studios.prep_desc: Checklists for diets, wardrobe prep, and shoot-day guidelines to ensure a successful first photoshoot.

prep_guides.title: ⏱️ Setting the Prep Period
prep_guides.desc: Allowing 2-3 months (60-90 days) is ideal. We advise balanced meals of carbs, proteins, and fats alongside moderate strength training, rather than extreme starvation.

prep_guides.title: 👙 Wardrobe & Nubra Preparation
prep_guides.desc: Skin-toned seamless underwear and sticky nubras are absolute essentials. FitGirls Studio also provides various monokinis, bodysuits, and activewear for rent.

prep_guides.title: ☀️ Tanning & Hair Removal
prep_guides.desc: For defined muscles and a healthy skin tone, we suggest 10+ sessions of indoor tanning starting 1 month prior. Waxing/shaving should be done 2-3 days before the shoot to prevent red spots.

prep_guides.title: 💧 Water Regulation & Sleep
prep_guides.desc: Slightly reduce water intake the night before to dry the skin layer and highlight definitions. Getting 7+ hours of deep sleep is crucial to avoid facial puffiness on the day.

prep_guides.title: 🎒 Shoot-Day Checklist
prep_guides.desc: Wear loose-fitting shirts or button-downs to avoid fabric marks on the skin and protect hair/makeup. Wash hair with shampoo only (no conditioner or oils) and keep skin free of lotions.

prep_guides.title: 📅 Managing Period Cycles
prep_guides.desc: If your cycle coincides with the shoot date, using tampons allows you to photograph bikinis and monokinis with zero issues. For severe pain or issues, contact us early to reschedule.

studios.price_desc: Clear price plans showing raw file inclusions and details without hidden fees, allowing beginners to choose easily.

faq.no_results: No relevant answer found. Try another keyword.
faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions

before_booking.question: How do I make a reservation?
before_booking.answer:
Please inquire with your name, contact info, desired date/time, and number of concepts.

Apply via our reservation system after consultation, and pay the 90,000 KRW deposit within 4 hours via the Toss notification on WhatsApp to finalize.

before_booking.question: I'm curious about the price.
before_booking.answer: Detailed pricing per package can be checked on Naver Smart Place or the Channel Talk consultation menu. Please refer to the FITORIAL package guide.

before_booking.question: Can I get on a waiting list?
before_booking.answer: We do not operate a separate waiting list. Availability changes frequently, so please check available dates directly via the reservation system.

before_booking.question: What is the cancellation and refund policy?
before_booking.answer:
100% refund of the deposit is possible for cancellations made 50 days before the shoot date.

However, in case of a schedule change, the deposit is non-refundable regardless of the remaining period.

From 49 days before until the day of the shoot, the deposit (90,000 KRW) will be charged as a penalty and is non-refundable.

before_booking.question: I want to change the reservation date or time.
before_booking.answer:
Changes are all owed only once up to 50 days before the shoot date.

If booked within 50 days of the shoot date, no changes or refunds are all owed regardless of the reason.

before_booking.question: What if the sender name is different from the reserver name?
before_booking.answer: If the names are different, please inform us via the consultation channel with the transfer date and sender name for confirmation.

before_shoot.question: Where can I find info on rental outfits?
before_shoot.answer: You can check Fitgirls' background concepts and rental outfit lineup in the Lookbook tab of the website.

before_shoot.question: When should I submit my concept draft?
before_shoot.answer:
You must upload your desired mood draft (images, outfit rental info, etc.) at least one week before the shoot.
Example filename: Name_Date (e.g., Chulmin_1025)

before_shoot.question: What time should I arrive on the day of the shoot?
before_shoot.answer:
Please arrive 30 minutes before your reservation time.

After arriving, you'll change outfits, pump, and prepare oils/vaseline to start the shoot punctuall y.

before_shoot.question: Are there props or exercise equipment provided?
before_shoot.answer: Oil and vaseline are provided. Dumbbells of various weights, bands, and mats are available for pumping. You can also use various props seen on Fitgirls' SNS.

before_shoot.question: Is parking available?
before_shoot.answer: Please use the paid valet service in front of the studio (10,000 KRW for 2 hours) or nearby paid parking lots.

before_shoot.question: I'm curious about hair removal and skin care (waxing/tanning) guidelines!
before_shoot.answer: It is natural to finish tanning 3-5 days before the shoot, and waxing or shaving is recommended 2-3 days before the shoot to allow for skin recovery. Clean skin conditions further enhance the quality of the photographer's retouching.

before_shoot.question: Can I shoot with my pet or a friend?
before_shoot.answer: Of course! Moments with your loved ones make for even more special records. However, please let us know in advance if you're bringing a pet so the photographer can prepare a comfortable environment. (A small additional fee may apply for accompanied shoots.)

before_shoot.question: It's my first time shooting. Do I really need to practice poses?
before_shoot.answer: Don't worry at all! Our photographer, who has data from over 10,000 shoots, will provide detailed directing, down to every fingertip and gaze. Just bring yourself, and we'll create model-like results for you.

after_shoot.question: When and how do I receive the raw photos?
after_shoot.answer: We will send all raw files via email and AirDrop on the day of the shoot.

after_shoot.question: How do I select photos for retouching?
after_shoot.answer:
Select the photos you want retouched and reply to inafit@daum.net.
Please do not change the file numbers to prevent errors. Selection must be made within 20 days.

You can check the real-time progress of your retouching at http://fitgirls.me/retouch. (ID: Phone number / PW: Last 4 digits of phone number)

after_shoot.question: ️ Do I select the photos myself, or does the photographer?
after_shoot.answer: We provide an online selection link so you can choose at your leisure from home. Find the point where the photographer's perspective meets your taste and pick the best cuts.

after_shoot.question: How long does retouching take?
after_shoot.answer: One photo will be retouched and sent back on the day of selection. The remaining photos take about 4 weeks for final results.

after_shoot.question: How extensive is the retouching process?
after_shoot.answer: The core of FITORIAL is 'beauty that reflects you.' Rather than excessive distortion, we aim for high-quality retouching that highlights your strengths and naturally covers weaknesses. This includes skin texture and body line correction, as well as the photographer's sophisticated color work tailored to the overall editorial mood.

after_shoot.question: ‍️ Can I request further edits after receiving retouched photos?
after_shoot.answer: Yes, it is possible! After receiving the first round of retouched photos, if you provide feedback to the photographer, we will help with detailed second-round corrections. We prioritize your satisfaction with the final results.

after_shoot.question: Can I get extra retouched photos?
after_shoot.answer: We offer 1 extra retouch for Naver reviews and 1 for Instagram agreement. Additional retouches can be purchased via our Smart Store (33,000 KRW each).

ai_summary.bullet2: Overwhelming satisfaction with delicate retouching and high-quality results
ai_summary.bullet3: Various concepts available and high quality of rental outfits

review1.author: Chulmin Kim
review1.text: It was my first body profile shoot, and the photographer lived up to their reputation. I had a lot of worries about poses and concepts, but they led me perfectly. I'm so satisfied and plan to visit again! They captured a life shot by catching even the small est details.

review2.author: Jihye Lee
review2.text: Above all , the photographer was so kind! I was very nervous before the shoot, but I filmed comfortably in a soft atmosphere. Especiall y the composition and colors came out so beautifully that everyone is asking where I shot it. Highly recommended!

ambassador.mission:
Directing your own life with self-love, consistency, and attitude, FITORIALIST+
Beyond simple beauty, an icon of influence inspiring the world with a unique presence.

chief_artist.title: ART DIRECTOR & PHOTOGRAPHER
chief_artist.name: ANGELO SHIN
chief_artist.slogan: "Sculpting your most perfect beauty through light, pose, and direction."
chief_artist.bio_title: Leading FITGIRLS & INAFIT and INACOMPANY, Art Director ANGELO SHIN is a unique visual artist who breaks the boundaries between high fashion, commercial, and fitness.
chief_artist.bio_desc1: His sharp sensibilities, cultivated since 2010 as the CEO of INAPADcom—Korea's leading fashion model magazine—align with the 'Pygmalion' philosophy of bringing artistic vision to life.
chief_artist.bio_desc2: Since launching FITGIRLS and INAFIT in 2014, he has connected with over 10,000 subjects, transcending conventional beauty standards to elevate individual personality and strength into artistic high-end pictorials.
chief_artist.bio_desc3: His lens, chosen by global luxury houses like Louis Vuitton, Gucci, and Chanel Jewelry, among many others, now goes beyond mere documentation to deliver a new visual catharsis known as 'FITORIAL'.
history: 2014 – Present | Launch of FITGIRLS & INAFIT, Directing over 10,000 body contents
2011 – Present | INACOMPANY (INAPADcom, INASTUDIO) CEO & Art Director
2009 – 2010 | Gaya Media (Bazaar, Esquire, Motor Trend, etc.) Photographer
2007 – 2009 | Modelline Photographer & Artist (Model/Actor pose directing & fashion event planning)
2001 – 2007 | Graduated from Sangmyung University, Department of Photography
chief_artist.portfolio_fashion: Fashion: Louis Vuitton, Chanel Jewelry, Gucci, GREEDILOUS, Juun.J, Wooyoungmi Homme, Miss Gee Collection, Pushbutton, KUHO, D.GNAK, Low Classic, 87mm, Yohanix, Munsoo Kwon, and many others
chief_artist.portfolio_beauty: Beauty: YSL Beauty, MAC Cosmetics, ID Hospital, and many others
chief_artist.portfolio_broadcast: Broadcast & Corporate: SidusHQ, Kia Motors, Delicious Guys, and many others
chief_artist.social_impact_desc: 2009 – 2024 | NGO 'HIMANGO' Africa South Sudan Tonj region volunteering and documentary filming (10 visits in total)
chief_artist.vision_desc: A record of beauty built with over 10,000 subjects. CEO Angelo Shin is planning a large-scale art exhibition project after 2025 to share the new art genre 'FITORIAL', which combines fitness and high fashion, more deeply with the public.
